tooltip.echoes.thrusters.hint: Hold use to fly where you look; right-click a Coil or Resonance Cell to recharge
tooltip.echoes.resonant.lore: Tuned to the octave — rhythmic balanced interchange.
tooltip.echoes.stillness.lore: The still magnetic centre of zero — all motion springs from rest.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echocite_ore: Overworld ore — drops Raw Echocite, the base of every recipe.
tooltip.echoes.desc.deepslate_echocite_o: The deepslate form of Echocite Ore.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drumstone_ore: A percussive ore — drops Drumstone Shards for Drum Cores.
tooltip.echoes.desc.silentite_ore: Rare Deep Dark ore — drops Silentite Crystals.
tooltip.echoes.desc.stillness_core: The still centre of zero: slowly generates Light from rest.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_coil: Resonant Coil — winds ambient sound into stored Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_conduit: Wave Conduit — carries Light between devices (1,000/t).
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonance_cell: Resonance Cell — banks up to 250,000 Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.compressor: Compressor — crushes ore into doubled dust using Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.transmuter: Transmuter — smelts any furnace recipe with Light, no fuel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.growth_radiator: Radiates Light as life — grows nearby crops and saplings.
tooltip.echoes.desc.warmth_radiator: Radiates heat — cooks dropped items and melts nearby ice.
tooltip.echoes.desc.polarity_field: Two poles in one: Attract pulls items in, Repel casts mobs out.
tooltip.echoes.desc.balancer: Evens Light across all storage on its network.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_relay: Wave Relay — beams items, fluids, and Light over a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_amplifier: Wave Amplifier — doubles a channel's throughput (×16 cap).
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_filter: Wave Filter — restricts a channel's items to a whitelist.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_splitter: Wave Splitter — even round-robin vs. fill-first delivery.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_repeater: Wave Repeater — extends a channel across dimensions.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_coupler: Wave Coupler — bridges the wired grid to a wireless channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_chest: Wave Chest — 27-slot storage that lives on a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.signal_relay: Signal Relay — broadcasts redstone over a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.greater_resonance_ce: High-octave bank — stores up to 2,000,000 Light; comparator-readable.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_coil: Higher-octave generator — a strong baseline Light source. Tunable rate; comparator-readable.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_conduit: Highest-octave carrier — 64,000 Light/t throughput on its network.
tooltip.echoes.desc.storm_caller: A conductive spire — during thunderstorms it calls lightning to itself and banks the windfall. Needs open sky; tunable strike rate.
tooltip.echoes.desc.verdant_loam: Living soil — pulses Light upward to grow nearby plants. Tunable radius and interval.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lumewood_log: A glowing log from the Octave Grove.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lumewood_planks: Luminous planks — the base of the Lumewood building set.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lumewood_leaves: Bright Lumewood leaves — drop a sapling.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lumewood_sapling: Plant on grass or Verdant Loam to grow a Lumewood tree.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lumebloom: A glowing flower — grants Glowing when stood in.
tooltip.echoes.desc.lume_lantern: A full-bright decorative block of woven Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echocite_bricks: Luminous masonry crafted from Echocite Dust.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_seed: The octave's rest point — catalyst that opens the transmutation chain.
tooltip.echoes.desc.radiant_dust: Charged dust — smelt or blast into a Radiant Ingot.
tooltip.echoes.desc.radiant_ingot: Block-of-light tier material; builds the Greater Resonance Cell.
tooltip.echoes.desc.raw_echocite: Smelt into an Echo Ingot, or crush for doubled dust.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echocite_dust: Smelt into an Echo Ingot. Crushed from raw echocite.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echo_ingot: The core crafting material of the mod.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echo_dust: Echocite + glowstone dust — crafts the Wave Atlas.
tooltip.echoes.desc.dull_ingot: A cheap alternate conduit material, smelted from Slag.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_slag: Crushing byproduct — smelt into a Dull Ingot.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drumstone_shard: Percussive shard — four make a Drum Core.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drum_core: An alternate Coil membrane; also powers the Thrusters.
tooltip.echoes.desc.silentite_crystal: Silent crystal of the Deep Dark — for the Stillness Core.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_tuner: Wave Tuner — copy/paste a channel; sneak-use opens device config.
tooltip.echoes.desc.wave_atlas: Wave Atlas — lists the devices on each active channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.light_meter: Light Meter — reads a device's role, stored Light, and flow.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_thrusters: Resonant Thrusters — hold use to fly where you look.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_pickaxe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_axe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_shovel: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_sword: Resonant blade — tuned to the octave; a hefty attack bonus.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_hoe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
screen.echoes.dissolve.tip: Dissolve the input item into banked Bound Light, and attune its tone.
screen.echoes.condense.tip: Re-create the template item from Bound Light (must be attuned). ×64 makes a stack.
tooltip.echoes.desc.transmutation_tablet: Portable transmutation terminal — opens your Bound-Light account anywhere.
tooltip.echoes.desc.transmutation_table: Your Bound-Light terminal: dissolve matter to bank it, withdraw Motes, or condense an attuned item.
tooltip.echoes.desc.light_mote: Raw Light — the universal One (64 Light Value). The base currency.
tooltip.echoes.desc.tonic_mote: Light wound an octave — the tonic (256 Light Value).
tooltip.echoes.desc.mediant_mote: The chord's middle tone (1,024 Light Value).
tooltip.echoes.desc.dominant_mote: The strong tone, nearing the crest (4,096 Light Value).
tooltip.echoes.desc.harmonic_mote: The resolved crest — balance (16,384 Light Value).
tooltip.echoes.star.hint: Use: charge from your account · Sneak-use: pour it back
message.echoes.star.emptied: Poured %s Bound Light into your account
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_1: Portable Bound-Light battery (100,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_2: Portable Bound-Light battery (400,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_3: Portable Bound-Light battery (1,600,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_4: Portable Bound-Light battery (6,400,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_5: Portable Bound-Light battery (25,600,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
tooltip.echoes.desc.octave_star_6: Portable Bound-Light battery (102,400,000). Charge it from your account and carry it.
